title: Qissa Tota wa Maina Mukammal
gloss: A collection of stories narrated to cure a king who was suffering from a disease which could only be remedied by listening to tales.

title: Raja Saryal Lila
gloss: The story of an Indian Raja who killed his own son for a feast a Jogi who, however, would not accept the offering. The boy was restored to life by Shiv Ji.
